pages.title: Gem Coatings
pages.text: A coated part retains both materials.$(p)The visible gem contributes its trait, and the metal core contributes its own trait. For example, a diamond coating over a gold core supplies both Adamant and Gilded.$(p)The same material always supplies the same trait in every eligible component slot.

pages.title: Diamond and Emerald
pages.text: $(bold)Adamant — diamond$()$(li)×1.35 suitable-block mining speed$(li)Attacks ignore 30% of armour$(p)$(bold)Fortunate — emerald$()$(li)Fortune operates 2 effective levels higher$(li)Looting operates 2 effective levels higher$(li)May operate above the enchantment's normal maximum

pages.title: Amethyst and Sapphire
pages.text: $(bold)Resonant — amethyst$()$(li)The highest-level installed non-curse enchantment operates 2 effective levels higher$(p)$(bold)Focused — sapphire$()$(li)×1.30 mining speed$(li)+0.55 attack speed$(li)Ignores airborne and underwater mining penalties$(li)Crossbows gain effective Quick Charge II$(p)Repeated components use the normal diminishing trait scaling.

pages.title: Ruby and Topaz
pages.text: $(bold)Keen — ruby$()$(li)×1.50 suitable-block mining speed$(li)×1.35 physical base damage$(p)$(bold)Forceful — topaz$()$(li)×1.60 suitable-block mining speed$(li)×1.60 physical base damage$(li)×1.50 durability wear

pages.title: Flint
pages.text: $(bold)Jagged — flint$()$(li)×1.35 suitable-block mining speed$(li)×1.35 physical base damage$(li)×2 durability wear$(p)Jagged makes crude flint a real high-output early construction rather than simply a disposable prerequisite.
